content.doc: ReadAllScopes walks up from cwd and reads every memory doc from every ancestor .leo/ directory. Results are merged nearest-first: when the same document ID appears in multiple scopes, the child's copy wins.  Symlinks are not followed (inherited from scope.Walk).
content.name: ReadAllScopes
content.summary: Function: ReadAllScopes — ReadAllScopes walks up from cwd and reads every memory doc from every ancestor .leo/ directory. R...
